title: Unit Economics Calculator
description: A spreadsheet for calculating and tracking your core unit economics: CAC, LTV, LTV:CAC ratio, and payback period.

sections.title: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
sections.description: How much it costs to acquire one customer

sections.title: Lifetime Value (LTV)
sections.description: How much revenue one customer generates over their lifetime

sections.title: Key Ratios
sections.description: The ratios that tell you if your model works
fields: CAC payback period = CAC / (ARPU × Gross margin)
Monthly churn rate = Customers lost / Starting customers

sections.title: Trend Tracking
sections.description: Track these monthly to spot problems early

howToUse: Calculate these numbers monthly. If LTV:CAC drops below 3:1, investigate whether acquisition is too expensive or retention is too low.
